---
title: "\'One Tragedy averted by Another\'"
---

## \'One Tragedy averted by Another\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** Non-fiction, translation
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (May 1880) 499-510

### Notes

This is described as \'abridged from the French [of Emile Souvestre] by Charlotte M. Yonge\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
